---
title: "vergelijking_alle_methoden_thesis"
author: "Ilse Hamers"
date: "2026-06-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# readme
This script is the analysis of all methods and models done after the 3 intermediate analyses

## Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(knitr)
```

# Data
```{r}
data_dir <- Sys.getenv("ANEMIA_DATA_DIR", unset = "data")

pad_workbook <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\CASTOR_export_compleet.xlsx")
pad_mapping_pe <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\castor_survey_Prompt_Engineering_Beoordeling_mapping.csv")
pad_mapping_rag <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\castor_survey_RAG_Beoordeling_mapping.csv")
pad_mapping_qlora <- file.path(data_dir,"CASTOR\\castor_survey_QLoRA_castor_mapping.csv")
```

## wide to long function
```{r}
wide_naar_lang <- function(df_wide, prefix_kolommen, mapping_df) {
  score_cols <- names(df_wide)[str_detect(names(df_wide), paste0("^", prefix_kolommen))]

  df_wide %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(score_cols),
      names_to = "variabele",
      values_to = "score"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      casus_nr = str_extract(variabele, "casus\\d+"),
      factor = str_extract(variabele, "[^_]+$")
    ) %>%
    select(beoordelaar, casus_nr, factor, score) %>%
    left_join(mapping_df, by = "casus_nr") %>%
    mutate(score = as.integer(score))
}

beoordelaar_hernoemen <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(beoordelaar = case_when(
      `Castor Participant ID` == 110006 ~ "B2",
      `Castor Participant ID` == 110007 ~ "B1",
      `Castor Participant ID` == 110008 ~ "B3"
    )) %>%
    select(-`Castor Participant ID`)
}
```

## Prompt Engineering
```{r}
df_pe_wide <- read_excel(pad_workbook, sheet = "Prompt_Engineering_Beoordeling") %>%
  beoordelaar_hernoemen()

df_map_pe <- read.csv(pad_mapping_pe) %>%
  mutate(
    UniekLabnummer = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "^\\d+"),
    methode = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "(zero|one|three)shot"),
    model = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "(medgemma4b|medgemma27b|phi4)")
  ) %>%
  select(-bestandsnaam)

df_pe_lang <- wide_naar_lang(df_pe_wide, "prompt_engineering", df_map_pe) %>%
  mutate(
    stage = "Prompt Engineering",
    methode = case_when(
      methode == "zeroshot" ~ "Zero-shot",
      methode == "oneshot" ~ "One-shot",
      methode == "threeshot" ~ "Three-shot"
    )
  )
```

## RAG
```{r}
df_rag_wide <- read_excel(pad_workbook, sheet = "RAG_Beoordeling") %>%
  beoordelaar_hernoemen()

df_map_rag <- read.csv(pad_mapping_rag) %>%
  mutate(
    UniekLabnummer = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "^\\d+"),
    methode = case_when(
      str_detect(bestandsnaam, "_hist") ~ "hist",
      str_detect(bestandsnaam, "_goud") ~ "goud"
    ),
    model = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "(medgemma4b|medgemma27b|phi4)")
  ) %>%
  select(-bestandsnaam)

df_rag_lang <- wide_naar_lang(df_rag_wide, "rag_beoordeling", df_map_rag) %>%
  mutate(
    stage = "RAG",
    methode = case_when(
      methode == "hist" ~ "RAG (historic)",
      methode == "goud" ~ "RAG (gold standard)"
    )
  )
```

## QLoRA
```{r}
df_qlora_wide <- read_excel(pad_workbook, sheet = "QLoRA_castor") %>%
  beoordelaar_hernoemen()

df_map_qlora <- read.csv(pad_mapping_qlora) %>%
  mutate(
    UniekLabnummer = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "^\\d+"),
    methode = if_else(str_detect(bestandsnaam, "_hist"), "hist", "goud"),
    model = str_extract(bestandsnaam, "(medgemma_4b|medgemma_27b|phi4)")
  ) %>%
  select(-bestandsnaam)

df_qlora_lang <- wide_naar_lang(df_qlora_wide, "qlora_castor", df_map_qlora) %>%
  mutate(
    stage   = "QLoRA",
    methode = case_when(
      methode == "hist" ~ "QLoRA (historic)",
      methode == "goud" ~ "QLoRA (gold standard)"
    )
  )
```

## merge into one dataset
```{r}
df_alle <- bind_rows(df_pe_lang, df_rag_lang, df_qlora_lang) %>%
  mutate(
    model = case_when(
      model %in% c("medgemma4b", "medgemma_4b") ~ "MedGemma 4B",
      model %in% c("medgemma27b", "medgemma_27b") ~ "MedGemma 27B",
      model == "phi4" ~ "Phi-4 14B"
    ),
    factor = case_when(
      factor == "correctheid" ~ "Clinical correctness",
      factor == "nuance" ~ "Nuance",
      factor == "databasering" ~ "Hallucination",
      factor == "format" ~ "Format",
      factor == "taalgebruik" ~ "Language"
    ),
    # ordered
    methode = factor(methode, levels = c(
      "Zero-shot", "One-shot", "Three-shot",
      "RAG (historic)", "RAG (gold standard)",
      "QLoRA (historic)", "QLoRA (gold standard)"
    )),
    stage = factor(stage, levels = c("Prompt Engineering", "RAG", "QLoRA")),
    model = factor(model, levels = c("MedGemma 4B", "MedGemma 27B", "Phi-4 14B"))
  )

df_totaal <- df_alle %>%
  group_by(beoordelaar, casus_nr, UniekLabnummer, model, methode, stage) %>%
  summarise(totaalscore = sum(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

# Descriptives
```{r}
df_desc <- df_totaal %>%
  group_by(model, stage, methode) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean = round(mean(totaalscore), 2),
    SD = round(sd(totaalscore), 2),
    Median = round(median(totaalscore), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(model, stage, methode)

kable(df_desc,
      caption = "Gemiddelde totaalscore (± SD) per model, stage en methode",
      col.names = c("Model", "Stage", "Method", "N", "Mean", "SD", "Median"))
```

# Visualisations

## boxplot per model with all methods --> not used in thesis

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
model_kleuren <- c(
  "Prompt Engineering" = "#e08282",
  "RAG" = "#bc4242",
  "QLoRA" = "#2c3e50"
)

for (m in levels(df_totaal$model)) {

  df_sub <- df_totaal %>% filter(model == m)

  p <- ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = methode, y = totaalscore, fill = stage)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.85, outlier.size = 1.5,
                 position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
    stat_summary(
      aes(group = stage),
      fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2.5,
      fill = "white", position = position_dodge2(width = 0.75, preserve = "single")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = model_kleuren) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Totaalscore per methode —", m),
      x = "Methode",
      y = "Totaalscore (max = 25)",
      fill = "Stage"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 25, by = 2)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(3.5, 5.5), linetype = "dashed",
               colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4)

  print(p)
}
```

## average cumulative score per model × methode
```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
df_means <- df_totaal %>%
  group_by(model, methode, stage) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(totaalscore),
    se_score = sd(totaalscore) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(df_means, aes(x = methode, y = mean_score,
                     colour = model, group = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_score - se_score,
                    ymax = mean_score + se_score),
                width = 0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "MedGemma 4B" = "#e08282",
    "MedGemma 27B" = "#bc4242",
    "Phi-4 14B" = "#2c3e50"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Average cumulative score (± SE) per model and method",
    x = "Method",
    y = "Average cumulative score",
    colour = "Model"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(10, 25, by = 1)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(3.5, 5.5), linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  annotate("text", x = 2,   y = 10.5, label = "Prompt Eng.",
           size = 3, colour = "grey50") +
  annotate("text", x = 4.5, y = 10.5, label = "RAG",
           size = 3, colour = "grey50") +
  annotate("text", x = 6.5, y = 10.5, label = "QLoRA",
           size = 3, colour = "grey50")
```

# LLm assumptions
```{r}
df_lmm_alle <- df_totaal %>%
  mutate(
    model = relevel(model, ref = "MedGemma 4B"),
    stage = relevel(stage, ref = "Prompt Engineering")
  )

model_alle_lmm <- lmer(
  totaalscore ~ model + stage + (1 | UniekLabnummer) + (1 | beoordelaar),
  data = df_lmm_alle
)

summary(model_alle_lmm)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
plot(fitted(model_alle_lmm), resid(model_alle_lmm),
     xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals", main = "Residuals vs Fitted")
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lty = 2)
qqnorm(resid(model_alle_lmm), main = "Q-Q plot residuals")
qqline(resid(model_alle_lmm), col = "red")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

# emmeans
```{r}
em_stage <- emmeans(model_alle_lmm, pairwise ~ stage, adjust = "bonferroni")
cat("\n-- Stage emmeans --\n")
print(em_stage$emmeans)
cat("\n-- Stage contrastes --\n")
print(em_stage$contrasts)

em_model_int <- emmeans(model_alle_lmm, pairwise ~ model, adjust = "bonferroni")
cat("\n-- Model emmeans --\n")
print(em_model_int$emmeans)
cat("\n-- Model contrastes --\n")
print(em_model_int$contrasts)
```
```{r}
model_interactie <- lmer(
  totaalscore ~ model * stage + (1 | UniekLabnummer) + (1 | beoordelaar),
  data = df_lmm_alle
)

summary(model_interactie)
```
